_template_instructions: Copy this file to skills/<domain>/<skill-name>/evals/evals.json. Replace all placeholder values. Remove this _template_instructions field.

evals.prompt: REPLACE: Full engineering scenario prompt. Include country context, traffic data, terrain, road function, and any relevant parameters. Be specific enough that a correct answer can be objectively evaluated.
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: Brief summary of the correct answer including key numerical values, standard selected, and classification.

assertions.text: REPLACE: Standard selection — correct manual/standard identified (e.g., 'Selects MoWT Road Design Manual')
REPLACE: Numerical accuracy — key calculation within acceptable range (e.g., 'Design speed between 70-100 km/h')
REPLACE: Country module — correct country-specific parameters applied
REPLACE: Assumption flagging — all assumed values explicitly marked with warning symbols
REPLACE: Output format — structured output matches SKILL.md Section 8 template

evals.prompt: REPLACE: Second scenario — different country or edge case
REPLACE: Third scenario — missing data or boundary condition

assertions.text: REPLACE: Escalation trigger — raises flag for missing/insufficient data
REPLACE: Reasonable defaults applied and documented
